description: Before starting a concrete demolition task, a foreman must conduct and document a pre-task safety briefing with the crew.

nodes.task_description: Retrieve the Job Hazard Analysis (JHA) for 'Concrete Demolition'.

expected_outcome.value: The relevant JHA document is retrieved.

nodes.task_description: Log that a pre-task briefing was held, covering the hazards and controls listed in the JHA.

expected_outcome.value: A new entry is made in the safety meeting log.

nodes.task_description: Record the names of the 6 crew members who attended the briefing.

expected_outcome.value: The attendee list is added to the log entry.
